data.name: {0}Continue now{1} or you will be redirected in {2} seconds.
data.value: {0}Nadaljuj zdaj{1} ali pa boš preusmerjen v {2} sekundah.

data.name: 2fa has been disabled. You can reenable 2fa when you setup an authenticator app
data.value: 2fa je bila onemogočena. 2fa lahko znova omogočiš, ko nastavite avtentikacijsko aplikacijo

data.name: Account roles and permissions for a single account.
data.value: Vloge in dovoljenja računa za en sam račun.

data.name: All changes that have been made to the attached file.
data.value: Vse spremembe, ki so bile narejene na priloženi datoteki.

data.name: All changes that have been made to the page.
data.value: Vse spremembe, ki so bile narejene na strani.

data.name: All comments made on the given page.
data.value: Vsi komentarji, dani na določeni strani.

data.name: All namespaces contained in the wiki.
data.value: Vse imenske prostore, ki jih vsebuje wiki.

data.name: All pages contained in the namespace.
data.value: Vse strani, ki so v imenskem prostoru.

data.name: All pages contained in the wiki.
An error occurred while processing your request.
data.value: Pri obdelavi vaše zahteve je prišlo do napake.

data.name: Are you sure you want to continue with this deletion?
data.value: Ste prepričani, da želite nadaljevati s to izbrisom?

data.name: Are you sure you want to continue?
Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
data.value: Ste prepričani, da želite izbrisati ta komentar?

data.name: Are you sure you want to detach
Are you sure you want to log out of the application?
data.value: Ste prepričani, da se želite odjaviti iz aplikacije?

data.name: Attach files by dropping them here or by manually selecting them below:
data.value: Pril EPCITE datoteke z razlitjem ali pa jih ročno izberite spodaj:

data.name: Browse pages marked with various processing instructions to see what is in draft, pending deletion, protected, etc.
data.value: Brskajte strani označene z različnimi navodili za obdelavo, da vidite, kaj je v osnutku, čaka na izbris, zaščiteno itd.

data.name: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
Confirmation link to change email sent. Please check your email.
data.value: Pošiljanje povezave za potrditveno spremembo e-pošte. Prosimo, preverite svojo e-pošto.

data.name: Create your account and configure your basic profile details.
data.value: Ustvari svoj račun in konfiguriraj osnovne podatke profila.

data.name: Default password has not been changed
Deleting '{0}' will move the page, all {1} revisions and associated file attachments to the deletion queue. This action can only be undone by an administrator or moderator. Continue?
data.value: Brisanje '{0}' bo premaknilo stran, vseh {1} revizij in pripadajočih datotek v čakalno vrsto za brisanje. To dejanje lahko prekliče le skrbnik ali moderator. Nadaljujete?

data.name: Deleting '{0}' will move the page, with all {1} revisions and {2} file attachments to the deletion queue.
data.value: Brisanje '{0}' bo premaknilo stran, skupaj z vsemi {1} revizijami in {2} priponkami v čakalno vrsto za brisanje.

data.name: Deleting '{0}' will permanently remove the account. All pages created or modified by this user will be attributed to a stand-in account and you will not be able to revert this action. Continue?
data.value: Brisanje '{0}' bo trajno odstranilo račun. Vse strani, ustvarjene ali spremenjene s tem računom, bodo pripisane začasnemu računu in tega dejanja ne boste mogli preklicati. Nadaljujete?

data.name: Deleting '{0}' will permanently remove the account. All pages created or modified by this user will be attributed to a stand-in account. Continue?
data.value: Brisanje '{0}' bo trajno odstranilo račun. Vse strani, ustvarjene ali spremenjene s tem računom, bodo pripisane začasnemu računu. Nadaljujete?

data.name: Deleting '{0}' will permanently remove the menu item and you will not be able to revert this action. Continue?
data.value: Brisanje '{0}' bo trajno odstranilo element menija, in tega dejanja ne boste mogli preklicati. Nadaljujte?

data.name: Deleting revision {0} of "{1}" will move the page revision to the deletion queue. This action can only be undone by an administrator or moderator. Continue?
data.value: Revizija {0} "{1}" bo premaknila revizijo strani v čakalno vrsto za brisanje. To dejanje lahko prekliče le skrbnik ali moderartor. Nadaljujete?

data.name: Deleting the emoji '{0}' will permanently remove the image and any references to it will be orphaned. You will not be able to revert this deletion. Continue?
data.value: Brisanje emojija '{0}' bo trajno odstranilo sliko in vse njene reference bodo ostale osirotele. Ali želite nadaljevati?

data.name: Deleting the role '{0}' will revoke any permissions granted or denied by that role. Continue?
data.value: Brisanje vloge '{0}' bo odvzelo vse pravice, dodeljene ali zavrnjene s to vlogo. Ali želite nadaljevati?

data.name: Disabling 2FA does not change the keys used in authenticator apps.
data.value: Onemogočanje 2FA ne spremeni ključev, uporabljenih v avtentikacijskih aplikacijah.

data.name: Don't have access to your authenticator device?
data.value: Ali nimate dostopa do vaše avtentikacijske naprave?

data.name: Download a two-factor authenticator app like Microsoft Authenticator for {0} and {1} or Google Authenticator for {2} and {3}.
data.value: Preverite aplikacijo za dvostopenjsko overjanje, kot sta Microsoft Authenticator za {0} in {1} ali Google Authenticator za {2} in {3}.

data.name: Drop file attachments here or click to upload manually.
data.value: Pusti priponke datotek tukaj ali klikni, da jih naložiš ročno.

data.name: Either the deleted pages queue is empty or your search criteria returned no results.
data.value: Ali je vrsta čakalne vrste izbrisanih strani ali vaš iskalni kriteriji nista vrnila rezultatov.

data.name: Either there are no accounts configured or your search criteria returned no results.
data.value: Ali ni konfiguriranih računov ali vaši iskalni kriteriji niso vrnili rezultatov.

data.name: Either there are no emojis configured or your search criteria returned no results.
data.value: Ali ni konfiguriranih emojijev ali vaši iskalni kriteriji niso vrnili rezultatov.

data.name: Either there are no pages or your search criteria returned no results.
data.value: Ali ni strani ali vaši iskalni kriteriji niso vrnili rezultatov.

data.name: Enter an internal path or external URL.
data.value: Vnesite interno pot ali zunanji URL.

data.name: Flushing the memory cache will cause any cached items to be dropped and require database hits as pages are requested. Continue?
data.value: Počistitev predpomnilnika bo povzročila odstranitev vseh shranjenih predmetov in bo zahtevala dostop do baze podatkov, ko bodo strani zahtevane. Nadaljujete?

data.name: Generating new recovery codes does not change the keys used in authenticator apps.
data.value: Ustvarjanje novih kod za obnovo ne spremeni ključev, uporabljenih v aplikacijah za overjanje.

data.name: Global configuration for security roles and membership.
data.value: Globalna konfiguracija za varnostne vloge in članstvo.

data.name: Global configuration for the site menu item.
data.value: Globalna konfiguracija za element menija spletnega mesta.

data.name: Global configuration for the site menu.
data.value: Globalna konfiguracija za meni spletnega mesta.

data.name: Global configuration values for the wiki, its functionality, behavior, formatting and branding.
data.value: Globalne konfiguracijske vrednosti za wiki, njegovo funkcionalnost, obnašanje, oblikovanje in znamko.

data.name: If it's here, you should be able to find it.
data.value: Če je tukaj, bi ga moral biti sposoben najti.

data.name: If you lose your device and don't have the recovery codes you will lose access to your account.
data.value: Če izgubite svojo napravo in nimate kod za obnovo, boste izgubili dostop do svojega računa.

data.name: If you reset your authenticator key your authenticator app will not work until you reconfigure it.
data.value: Če ponastavite svoj skrbnik ključa, vaša aplikacija za potrditve ne bo delovala, dokler je ne konfigurirate znova.

data.name: If you wish to change the key used in an authenticator app you should reset your authenticator keys.
data.value: Če želite spremeniti ključ, ki ga uporablja aplikacija za potrditve, morate ponastaviti svoje ključe potrditve.

data.name: It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users.
data.value: To lahko privede do prikaza občutljivih informacij iz izjem uporabnikom.

data.name: Log in using your {0} account
data.value: Prijavite se z uporabo svojega računa {0}

data.name: Logging out will make sure that others can't use this session to make changes to the wiki. You'll need to log back in before making changes.
data.value: Odjava bo zagotovila, da drugi ne morejo uporabljati te sej do ponovne prijave. Preden izvedete spremembe, se bomo morali ponovno prijaviti.

data.name: No database information is available.
data.value: Informacije o bazi podatkov niso na voljo.

data.name: Once you have scanned the QR code or input the key above, your two factor authentication app will provide you with a unique code. Enter the code in the confirmation box below.
data.value: Ko enkrat skenirate QR kodo ali vnesete zgornji ključ, vam bo vaša aplikacija za dvostopenjsko preverjanje zagotovila edinstveno kodo. Vnesite kodo v spodnje polje za potrditev.

data.name: Page revisions that have been deleted for the given page. These can be purged or restored.
data.value: Rešitve strani, ki so bile izbrisane za dano stran. Te je mogoče izbrisati ali obnoviti.

data.name: Pages that have been deleted. Can be purged or restored.
data.value: Strani, ki so bile izbrisane. Morda jih je mogoče izbrisati ali obnoviti.

data.name: Pages that have been linked to, but do not exist.
data.value: Strani, ki so bile povezane, vendar ne obstajajo.

data.name: Please check your email to confirm your account.
data.value: Prosim, preverite svoj e-poštni naslov, da potrdite svoj račun.

data.name: Please check your email to reset your password.
data.value: Prosim, preverite svoj e-poštni naslov, da ponastavite geslo.

data.name: Please click here to log in
Please enter both username and password.
Privacy and cookie policy have not been accepted.
data.value: Politika zasebnosti in piškotkov ni bila sprejeta.

data.name: Purging the page compilation statistics will delete all of the stored compilation statistics for all pages. Continue?
data.value: Čiščenje statistike sestave strani bo izbrisalo vse shranjene statistike sestave za vse strani. Nadaljujte?

data.name: Put these codes in a safe place.
data.value: Postavite te kode na varno mesto.

data.name: Remove this {0} login from your account
data.value: Odstrani to prijavo {{0}} iz svojega računa

data.name: Reverting "{0}" from revision {1} to {2} will rollback {3} changes.
data.value: Razveljavitev "{0}" iz različice {1} na {2} bo povrnila {3} sprememb.

data.name:
Reverting {0} from revision {1} to {2} will rollback {3} changes.
Reverting does not mean that changes will be lost however, the revert process will create a new revision with the reverted changes.

Are you sure you want to continue?
data.value:
Razveljavljanje {0} iz različice {1} na {2} bo povrnilo {3} sprememb.
Razveljavitev ne pomeni, da bodo spremembe izgubljene, temveč bo postopek razveljavitve ustvaril novo različico z razveljavljenimi spremembami.

Ste prepričani, da želite nadaljevati?

data.name: Reverting does not mean that changes will be lost however, the revert process will create a new revision with the reverted changes.
data.value: Razveljavljanje ne pomeni, da bodo spremembe izgubljene, vendar bo postopek razveljavitve ustvaril novo različico z razveljavljenimi spremembami.

data.name: Review the differences between revisions of this page.
data.value: Oglejte si razlike med različicami te strani.

data.name: Save the page before uploading files.
Scan the QR Code or enter this key <kbd>{0}</kbd> into your two factor authenticator app. Spaces and casing do not matter.
data.value: Skenirajte QR kodo ali vnesite ta ključ <kbd>{0}</kbd> v vašo aplikacijo za dvostavno preverjanje. Presledki in velikost črk nimata pomena.

data.name: Swapping to the Development environment displays detailed information about the error that occurred.
data.value: Preklop na okolje Razvoj prikazuje podrobne informacije o napaki, ki se je zgodila.

data.name: The account has been deleted and all content that was created or modified by this account has been attributed to an anonymized profile.
data.value: Račun je bil izbrisan, vse vsebine, ki jih je ustvaril ali spremenil ta račun, pa so pripisane anonimiziranemu profilu.

data.name: The compilation statistics for all wiki page operations.
data.value: Statistika sestavljanja za vse operacije na wiki straneh.

data.name: The current browser has been forgotten. When you login again from this browser you will be prompted for your 2fa code.
data.value: Trenutni brskalnik je bil pozabljen. Ko se ponovno prijavite iz tega brskalnika, boste pozvani vnesite svojo 2fa kodo.

data.name: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.
data.value: Razvojno okolje ne bi smelo biti omogočeno za nameščene aplikacije.

data.name: The external login was not added. External logins can only be associated with one account.
data.value: Zunanji prijava ni bila dodana. Zunanji prijavi je mogoče povezati le z enim računom.

data.name: The external login was not removed.
data.value: Zunanji prijavi ni bilo mogoče odstraniti.

data.name: The page does not have any comments, why don't you add one?
data.value: Stran nima nobenih komentarjev, zakaj jih ne dodate?

data.name: The requested page or revision does not exist.
data.value: Zahtevana stran ali različica ne obstaja.

data.name: The selected page does not have any revisions.
There are currently no missing pages being referenced by other wiki pages.
data.value: Trenutno ni manjkajočih strani, ki jih pričujejo druge wiki strani.

data.name: There are currently no pages which exist within namespaces.
data.value: Trenutno ni strani, ki obstajajo znotraj imenikov.

data.name: There are no compilation statistics available.
There are no deleted revisions for this page.
data.value: Za to stran ni izbrisanih različic.

data.name: There are no menu items configured.
There are no orphaned page attachments.
There are no pages which contain the selected processing instruction.
data.value: Ni strani, ki vsebujejo izbrano navodilo za obdelavo.

data.name: There are no security roles configured.
These are all of the page attachments that are no longer attached to any page revision.
data.value: To so vse priponke strani, ki jih več ni povezano z nobeno različico strani.

data.name: This account has been locked out, please try again later.
data.value: Ta račun je bil zaklenjen, poskusite znova pozneje.

data.name: This action can only be undone by a moderator or administrator.
data.value: To dejanje lahko razveljavijo le moderator ali skrbnik.

data.name: This display name will be visible publicly.
data.value: To prikazno ime bo javno vidno.

data.name: This file does not have any revisions.
data.value: This file does not have any revisions.

data.name: This is your profile, do with it what you may.
data.value: This is your profile, do with it what you may.

data.name: This process disables 2FA until you verify your authenticator app. If you do not complete your authenticator app configuration you may lose access to your account.
data.value: Ta postopek onemogoči 2FA, dokler ne preverite svoje aplikacije za overjanje. Če ne dokončate konfiguracije, lahko izgubite dostop do svojega računa.

data.name: This will check the database integrity and validate all foreign keys. Continue?
data.value: This will check the database integrity and validate all foreign keys. Continue?

data.name: This will compile all pages in the wiki and store them in cache. This could take some time! Continue?
data.value: To bo prevedli vse strani v wiki-ju in jih shranili v predpomnilnik. To bi lahko trajalo nekaj časa! Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will merge in all default configuration, but will not overwrite any of your currently configured settings. Continue?
data.value: To bo združilo vse privzete nastavitve, vendar ne bo prepisalo nobenih vaših trenutnih konfiguracij. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will optimize the database indexes and structure. Continue?
data.value: To bo optimiziralo indekse in strukturo podatkovne baze. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will permanently delete the specified attachment. Continue?
data.value: To bo trajno izbrisalo določeno priponko. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will permanently delete the specified deleted revision. Continue?
data.value: To bo trajno izbrisalo določeno izbrisano različico. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will permanently delete the specified page, all revisions and attachments. Continue?
data.value: To bo trajno izbrisalo določeno stran, vse različice in priponke. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will permanently purge all deleted page revisions for "{0}". Continue?
data.value: To bo trajno počistilo vse izbrisane različice strani za "{0}". Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will permanently purge all deleted pages. Continue?
data.value: To bo trajno počistilo vse izbrisane strani. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will permanently purge all event logs. Continue?
data.value: To bo trajno počistilo vse dnevnike dogodkov. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will permanently purge all orphaned page attachments. Continue?
data.value: To bo trajno počistilo vse samostojne priponke strani. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will rebuild all pages in the wiki. This could take some time! Continue?
data.value: To bo znova zgradilo vse strani v wiki-ju. To bi lahko trajalo nekaj časa! Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will remove empty space from the database, which can free space if a lot of data has been deleted. Continue?
data.value: To bo odstranilo prazni prostor iz podatkovne baze, kar lahko sprosti prostor, če je bilo veliko podatkov izbrisano. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will restore all built-in namespace pages, overwriting any customizations you may have made. Continue?
data.value: To bo obnovilo vse strani v vrsnikih poimenu, prepisalo pa vse prilagoditve, ki ste jih morda naredili. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will restore all default themes, overwriting any customizations you may have made in the database. Continue?
data.value: To bo obnovilo vse privzete teme, prepisalo pa vse prilagoditve, ki ste jih morda naredili v podatkovni bazi. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will restore all Feature Templates, overwriting any customizations you may have made. Continue?
data.value: To bo obnovilo vse Predloge funkcij, prepisalo pa vse prilagoditve, ki ste jih morda naredili. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will restore all Include namespace pages. Continue?
data.value: To bo obnovilo vse strani v vrsniku Include. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will restore all Wiki Help namespace pages. Continue?
data.value: To bo obnovilo vse strani v vrsniku Wiki Pomoč. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will restore the deleted page and all of its history. Continue?
data.value: To bo obnovilo izbrisano stran in vso njeno zgodovino. Nadaljujte?

data.name: This will restore the deleted revision. Continue?
data.value: To bo obnovilo izbrisano različico. Nadaljujte?

data.name: To use an authenticator app go through the following steps:
data.value: Za uporabo avtentikatorja sledite naslednjim korakom:

data.name: Truncating the page revisions will delete all the revision history for all pages and page attachments. This will leave only the most current revision of all objects. This is generally considered a big deal! Continue?
data.value: Prekinitev različic strani bo izbrisala vso zgodovino različic za vse strani in priponke. To bo pustilo samo najnovejšo različico vseh predmetov. To velja za zelo pomembno! Nadaljujte?

data.name: Use the Templates namespace to add a page to the list of templates, e.g. Templates :: My First Template.
data.value: Za dodajanje strani na seznam predlog poimenujte v prostoru imen Templates, npr. Templates :: Moja prva predloga.

data.name: Various utilities to assist in management of the SQLite database.
data.value: Različne utilities za pomoč pri upravljanju baze SQLite.

data.name: Verification email sent. Please check your email.
data.value: Preveritveno e-pošto poslano. Prosimo, preverite svoj e-poštni predal.

data.name: What did you change and why?
You are viewing a page revision which was deleted on {0} by {1}.
data.value: Ogledate si različico strani, ki je bila izbrisana dne {0} s strani {1}.

data.name: You are viewing a page which was deleted on {0} by {1}.
data.value: Ogledate si stran, ki je bila izbrisana dne {0} s strani {1}.

data.name: You are viewing revision {0} of "{1}" modified by {2} on {3}.
data.value: Ogledate si različico {0} strani "{1}", katero je spremenil {2} dne {3}.

data.name: You can generate a new set of recovery codes.
data.value: Medic lahko ustvarite nov nabor kodov za obnovo.

data.name: You can log in with a recovery code
data.value: Med seboj se lahko prijavite s kodo za obnovo

data.name: You do not have a local username/password for this site. Add a local account so you can log in without an external login.
data.value: Za to stran nimate lokalnega uporabniškega imena/gesla. Dodajte lokalni račun, da se lahko prijavite brez zunanjega prijavljanja.

data.name: You do not have access to this resource.
You have {0} recovery codes left.
data.value: Preostal vam je {0} kodov za obnovo.

data.name: You have 1 recovery code left.
data.value: Preostal vam je 1 kodi za obnovo.

data.name: You have generated new recovery codes.
data.value: Ustvarili ste nove kode za obnovo.

data.name: You have no recovery codes left.
data.value: Ni vam preostalih kodov za obnovo.

data.name: You have requested to log in with a recovery code. This login will not be remembered until you provide an authenticator app code at log in or disable 2FA and log in again.
data.value: Za prijavo ste zaprosili s kodo za obnovo. Ta prijava ne bo shranjena, dokler ne vnesete kode iz avtentikatorske aplikacije ob prijavi ali onemogočite 2FA in se ponovno prijavite.

data.name: You have successfully logged out of the application.
You have successfully signed in with LDAP but we still need a bit of information.
data.value: uspešno ste se prijavili z LDAP-jem, a še vedno potrebujemo nekaj informacij.

data.name: You have successfully signed in with the external provider but we still need a bit of information.
data.value: uspešno ste se prijavili preko zunanjega ponudnika, a še vedno potrebujemo nekaj informacij.

data.name: You must accept the policy before you can enable two factor authentication.
data.value: Preden omogočite dvostranko overjanje, morate sprejeti politiko.

data.name: You must generate a new set of recovery codes before you can log in with a recovery code.
data.value: Preden se lahko prijavite s kodom za obnovo, morate ustvariti nov niz kod za obnovo.

data.name: You should generate a new set of recovery codes.
data.value: Morate ustvariti nov niz kod za obnovo.

data.name: You've successfully authenticated with {0}. Please enter an email address for this site below and click the Register button to finish logging in.
data.value: Uspešno ste se overili z {0}. Vnesite e-poštni naslov za to stran spodaj in kliknite gumb Registracija, da dokončate prijavo.

data.name: Your authenticator app has been verified.
data.value: Vaša aplikacija za overjanje je bila preverjena.

data.name: Your authenticator app key has been reset, you will need to configure your authenticator app using the new key.
data.value: Ključ vaše aplikacije za overjanje je bil ponastavljen, zato morate konfigurirati svojo aplikacijo za overjanje z novim ključem.

data.name: Your login is protected with an authenticator app. Enter your authenticator code below.
data.value: Vaša prijava je zaščitena z aplikacijo za overjanje. Vnesite vašo kodo za overjanje spodaj.

data.name: Your search criteria resulted in no pages, simplify your search text.
data.value: Vaše iskalne kriterije niso vrnile nobenih strani, poenostavite vaše iskalno besedilo.

data.name: An error occurred retrieving user information from the external provider.
data.value: Pri pridobivanju informacij o uporabniku od zunanjega ponudnika je prišlo do napake.

data.name: An error occurred while adding the login.
data.value: Pri dodajanju prijave je prišlo do napake.

data.name: An error occurred while creating the user.
data.value: Pri ustvarjanju uporabnika je prišlo do napake.

data.name: Display Name is already in use.
data.value: Prikazno ime je že v uporabi.

data.name: Error loading external login information during confirmation.
data.value: Pri nalaganju podatkov o zunanji prijavi med potrditvijo je prišlo do napake.

data.name: Error loading external login information.
data.value: Pri nalaganju podatkov o zunanji prijavi je prišlo do napake.

data.name: Failed to add login info for LDAP stub account: {0}.
data.value: Ne uspešno dodajanje informacij o prijavi za LDAP stub račun: {0}.

data.name: Failed to create stub account for the LDAP credential: {0}.
data.value: Ne uspešno ustvarjanje stub računa za poverilnico LDAP: {0}.

data.name: Failed to locate the user account for the LDAP credential.
data.value: Ni bilo mogoče najti uporabniškega računa za LDAP poverilnico.

data.name: Thank you for confirming your email change.
data.value: Hvala, da ste potrdili svojo spremembo e-pošte.

data.name: Thank you for confirming your email.
data.value: Hvala, da ste potrdili svojo e-pošto.

data.name: The email address was not supplied by the external provider.
data.value: Elektronski naslov ni bil posredovan s strani zunanjega ponudnika.

data.name: The specified user could not be found.
data.value: Uporabnika z določenim imenom ni bilo mogoče najti.

data.name: User created a new account with LDAP.
data.value: Uporabnik je ustvaril nov račun z LDAP.

data.name: Basic wiki settings such as formatting.
data.value: Osnovne nastavitve wiki, kot je oblikovanje.

data.name: Configuration for Active Directory authentication using LDAP
data.value: Konfiguracija za avtentikacijo Active Directory z uporabo LDAP

data.name: Configuration related to searching and indexing.
data.value: Konfiguracija v zvezi z iskanjem in indeksiranjem.

data.name: Filesystem location where persistent cookies are stored for saved session logins.
data.value: Lokacija datotečnega sistema, kjer so shranjene trajne piškotke za shranjene seje prijav

data.name: HTML email template for new account verification
data.value: HTML predloga e-pošte za verificacijo novega računa

data.name: HTML email template to use when sending a password reset email.
data.value: HTML predloga e-pošte za pošiljanje e-pošte za ponastavitev gesla

data.name: HTML placed inside the body tag but directly after the other body content.
data.value: HTML, ki je postavljen znotraj taga body, a neposredno za ostalo vsebino v body-ju

data.name: HTML placed inside the body tag but just before the other content of the page.
data.value: HTML postavljena znotraj taga body, tik pred ostalo vsebino strani.

data.name: HTML placed into the footer section of the page.
HTML placed into the header section of the HTML. A useful place to put scripts and CSS.
data.value: HTML postavljena v glavo HTML-ja. Uporaben kraj za vstavljanje skript in CSS-ja.

data.name: If set, users can not login until their email addresses are verified. If changed, the website will need to be restarted. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Če je nastavljeno, uporabniki se ne morejo prijaviti, dokler njihovi e-poštni naslovi niso preverjeni. Če se spremeni, bo potrebno znova zagnati spletno stran. Privzeto: Vklopljeno.

data.name: If set, users will be allowed to sing up and create their own account. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Če je nastavljeno, bodo uporabniki lahko ustvarili račun in se prijavili. Privzeto: Vklopljeno.

data.name: Include wiki Description in Meta
data.value: Vključi opis wiki v meta podatke

data.name: Include wiki Tags in Meta
data.value: Vključi oznake wiki v meta podatke

data.name: Maximum size in bytes for a user any page attachment.
data.value: Največja velikost v bajtih za priponko uporabnika na strani.

data.name: Maximum size in bytes for a user avatar image.
data.value: Največja velikost v bajtih za sliko avatarja uporabnika.

data.name: Maximum size in bytes for an emoji image.
data.value: Največja velikost v bajtih za emoji sliko.

data.name: Membership settings such as defaults for new members and permissions.
data.value: Nastavitve članstva, kot so privzeti za nove člane in dovoljenja.

data.name: Number of hours before cookies expire.
Show Last Modified on Page Footer
data.value: Prikaži nazadnje spremenjeno v nogi strani

data.name: Template: Account Verification Email
data.value: Predloga: E-poštno sporočilo za preverjanje računa

data.name: Template: Reset Password Email
data.value: Predloga: E-poštno sporočilo za ponastavitev gesla

data.name: The account name to use for all email communications.
data.value: Ime računa, ki ga je treba uporabiti za vse e-poštne komunikacije.

data.name: The base theme to use for all site styling.
data.value: Osrednja tema za vse oblikovanje spletnega mesta.

data.name: The brand image of the wiki, this is displayed on the top of all wiki pages.
data.value: Podoba blagovne znamke wiki-ja, prikazana na vrhu vseh strani wiki-ja.

data.name: The copyright of the wiki, this is shown at the bottom of all pages.
data.value: Avtorske pravice wiki-ja, prikazane na dnu vseh strani.

data.name: The country to use for the site culture for guests.
data.value: Država, ki jo je treba uporabiti za kulturo spletnega mesta za goste.

data.name: The default country to use for new accounts.
The default domain to use when the user does not specify a UPN or a fully qualified domain\\Username when signing in.
data.value: Privzema domena, ki jo je treba uporabiti, ko uporabnik ne navede UPN ali popolnoma opremljene domene\Uporabniško ime pri prijavi.

data.name: The default height to scale emojis to. The width will be scaled to the same ratio. Default: 24.
data.value: Privzeta višina za prilagoditev emojijev. Širina bo prilagojena glede na isto razmerje. Privzeto: 24.

data.name: The default language to use for new accounts.
The default role to assign accounts when they sing up. Default: Contributor.
data.value: Privzeta vloga za dodeljevanje računov ob registraciji. Privzeto: Prispevalec.

data.name: The default time zone to use for new accounts.
data.value: Privzeti časovni pas za nove račune.

data.name: The display name to show for all email communications.
data.value: Prikazno ime za vse e-poštne komunikacije.

data.name: The footer of the wiki, this is shown at the bottom of all pages.
data.value: Nogavica wiki-ja, prikazana na dnu vseh strani.

data.name: The fully qualified domain name to use when performing LDAP authentication.
data.value: Popolnoma kvalificirano ime domene za LDAP avtentikacijo.

data.name: The internet address of your wiki.
The language to use for the site culture for guests.
data.value: Jezik za kulturo spletnega mesta za goste.

data.name: The memory limit (in megabytes) for the cache. Oldest items will be ejected when limit is reached. Default: 1024.
data.value: Omejitev pomnilnika (v megabajtih) za predpomnilnik. Najstarejše elemente bo zavrgel, ko bo dosežena meja. Privzeto: 1024.

data.name: The name of the wiki page to display when a non existing page is requested.
data.value: Ime strani wiki-ja, ki ga je treba prikazati, ko je zahtevana neobstoječa stran.

data.name: The name of the wiki page to display when a non existing page revision is requested.
data.value: Ime strani wiki-ja, ki jo je treba prikazati, ko je zahtevana neobstoječa različica strani.

data.name: The name of the wiki page to use as the default content when new wiki pages are created.
data.value: Ime strani wiki-ja, ki ga je treba uporabiti kot privzeto vsebino pri ustvarjanju novih strani wiki-ja.

data.name: The name of the wiki, this is displayed everywhere.
data.value: Ime wiki-ja, ki se prikazuje povsod.

data.name: The number of items to return when pagination is used. Default: 20.
data.value: Število elementov, ki jih je treba vrniti pri uporabi straničnih seznamov. Privzeto: 20.

data.name: The number of recently modified pages to show on users public profiles. Default: 10.
data.value: Število nedavno spremenjenih strani, prikazanih na javnih profilih uporabnikov. Privzeto: 10.

data.name: The number of seconds to cache pages in memory (0 = disabled). Default: 300.
data.value: Število sekund, ki jih naj bojo strani predpomnjene v pomnilniku (0 = onemogočeno). Privzeto: 300.

data.name: The SMTP password to use when sending email.
data.value: Geslo SMTP, ki ga je treba uporabiti pri pošiljanju e-pošte.

data.name: The SMTP port to use when sending email. Default: 587.
data.value: Vhod SMTP, ki ga je treba uporabiti pri pošiljanju e-pošte. Privzeto: 587.

data.name: The SMTP server ip/host to use when sending email.
data.value: IP/domenski strežnik SMTP, ki ga je treba uporabiti pri pošiljanju e-pošte.

data.name: The time zone to use for the site culture for guests.
data.value: Časovni pas za uporabo za kulturo spletne strani za goste.

data.name: Value between 0.0 and 1.0 that determines how strong of a match a page search needs to be before it it returned in search results. Default: 0.6.
data.value: Vrednost med 0.0 in 1.0, ki določa, kako močno mora biti iskanje strani, da pride v rezultate iskanja. Privzeto: 0.6.

data.name: When building a search index, these words will be excluded from indexing. (Comma separated)
data.value: Med izdelavo iskalnega indeksa bodo te besede izključene iz indeksiranja. (Ločene s vejico)

data.name: When comments are enabled, this option causes comments to be shown at the bottom of each page. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Ko so komentarji omogočeni, ta možnost prikaže komentarje na dnu vsake strani. Privzeto: Vklopljeno.

data.name: Whether a search box will be shown on the navigation bar. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Ali se bo prikazal iskalnik na navigacijskem меню. Privzeto: Vklopljeno.

data.name: Whether or not OpenID Connect is enabled.
Whether or not the engine should perform a lazy pre-load of all animated emojis on startup.
data.value: Ali naj engine opravi leno prednalaganje vseh animiranih emojijev ob zagonu.

data.name: Whether or not to authenticate with LDAP when attempting to login users.
data.value: Ali naj se avtentikacija izvede z LDAP ob poskusu prijave uporabnikov.

data.name: Whether or not to use a secure connection to LDAP. This is not always supported by domains.
data.value: Ali naj se uporablja varna povezava z LDAP. To ni vedno podprto na domenah.

data.name: Whether page comments will be enabled. Authentication is required for comment, but all can read. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Ali bodo omogočeni komentarji na straneh. Za komentiranje je potrebna avtentikacija, brati pa lahko vsi. Privzeto: Vklopljeno.

data.name: Whether SMTP should connect using SSL or not.
data.value: Ali naj SMTP vzpostavi povezavo z uporabo SSL ali ne.

data.name: Whether the description of the page should be included in the HTML head meta. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Ali naj bo opis strani vključen v HTML v glavo meta oznako. Privzeto: Vklopljeno.

data.name: Whether the top menu should stay in place when scrolling vertically.
data.value: Ali naj zgornje menije ostanejo na mestu pri vertikalnem pomikanju.

data.name: Whether the wiki tags attached to the page should be included in the HTML head meta keywords. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Ali naj bodo tagi wikipedije pripete strani vključeni v meta ključne besede v HTML glavi. Privzeto: Vklopljeno.

data.name: Whether to allow non-exact matches when searching. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Ali naj bo dovoljeno iskanje z nepopolnimi ujemanji. Privzeto: Vklopljeno.

data.name: Whether to record page wiki Record compilation metrics to the database. This can be used for performance turning, but can itself cause slowness. Default: Disabled.
data.value: Ali naj se beležijo metrični podatki o sestavi zapisov strani wiki v bazo podatkov. To lahko izboljša zmogljivost, vendar lahko povzroči tudi počasnost. Privzeto: Onemogočeno.

data.name: Whether to show the last user and date that a page was modified with a link to the public user profile. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Ali naj se prikaže zadnji uporabnik in datum, ko je bila stran nazadnje spremenjena, s povezavo do javnega uporabniškega profila. Privzeto: Vklopljeno.

data.name: Whether to show the textbox to allow the user to enter a change summary when editing pages.
data.value: Ali naj bo vpisano tekstovno polje za vnos povzetka sprememb pri urejanju strani.

data.name: Whether to split CamelCasedStrings when parsing pages for search tokens. This can be helpful when pages contain a lot of programming/code content. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Ali naj se pri razčlenjevanju strani za iskalne izraze razdeli CamelCasedStrings. To je lahko koristno, kadar strani vsebujejo veliko vsebine programiranja/kod. Privzeto: Vklopljeno.

data.name: Whether users are required to enter a change summary when editing pages. Note that "Show Change Summary when Editing" must also be enabled.
data.value: Ali morajo uporabniki ob urejanju strani vpisati povzetek sprememb. Upoštevajte, da mora biti omogočeno tudi "Prikaži povzetek sprememb pri urejanju".

data.name: Whether visitors can view members and their public profiles.
data.value: Ali si obiskovalci lahko ogledajo člane in njihove javne profile.

data.name: The account is already a member of the specified role.
data.value: Račun je že član določene vloge.

data.name: Are you sure you want to remove the permission from this account?
data.value: Ali ste prepričani, da želite odstraniti dovoljenje s tega računa?

data.name: Are you sure you want to remove the role from this account?
data.value: Ali ste prepričani, da želite odstraniti vlogo s tega računa?

data.name: You must select a permission disposition.
You must select either page or namespace.
data.value: Morate izbrati bodisi stran ali imenski prostor.

data.name: The account already has the specified permission.
Are you sure you want to remove the permission from this role?
data.value: Ali ste prepričani, da želite odstraniti dovoljenje iz te vloge?

data.name: Are you sure you want to remove the member from this role?
data.value: Ali ste prepričani, da želite odstraniti člana iz te vloge?

data.name: The role already has the specified permission.
Failed to get information from external provider
data.value: Ne uspešno pridobivanje informacij od zunanjega ponudnika

data.name: You cannot revert to the current page revision.
data.value: Ni mogoče vrniti na trenutno različico strani.

data.name: The specified page could not be found.
The page could not be found.
You cannot delete the only existing revision of a page, instead you would need to delete the entire page.
data.value: Ni mogoče izbrisati edine obstoječe različice strani, namesto tega morate izbrisati celotno stran.

data.name: Page revision has been moved to the deletion queue.
data.value: Različica strani je bila premaknjena v čakalno vrsto za brisanje.

data.name: All pages have been rebuilt.
data.value: Vse strani so bile ponovno zgrajene.

data.name: All pages have been cached.
data.value: Vse strani so bile shranjene v predpomnilnik.

data.name: All page revisions have been truncated.
data.value: Vse različice strani so bile skrajšane.

data.name: The page deletion queue has been purged.
data.value: Čakalna vrsta za brisanje strani je bila izbrana.

data.name: The page revision has been purged from the deletion queue.
data.value: Različica strani je bila izbrisana iz čakalne vrste za brisanje.

data.name: The page revision has been restored.
The page has been purged from the deletion queue.
data.value: Stran je bila izbrisana iz čakalne vrste za brisanje.

data.name: The page has been moved to the deletion queue.
data.value: Stran je bila premaknjena v čakalno vrsto za brisanje.

data.name: All orphaned page attachments have been purged.
data.value: Vse priponke osirotele strane so bile izbrisane.

data.name: The pages orphaned attachments have been purged.
data.value: Osirotele priponke strani so bile izbrisane.

data.name: The menu item has been created.
The menu item has been saved.
The specified menu item has been deleted.
data.value: Izbrana postavka menija je bila izbrisana.

data.name: The configuration has been saved successfully!
Emoji name is already in use.
data.value: Ime emojija je že v uporabi.

data.name: Could not save the attached image, too large.
data.value: Slike, priložene, ni bilo mogoče shraniti, prevelika je.

data.name: Could not save the attached image.
data.value: Slike, priložene, ni bilo mogoče shraniti.

data.name: The emoji has been saved successfully!
The specified emoji has been deleted.
All event logs have been purged.
data.value: Vsi dogodki v dnevniku so bili izbrisani.

data.name: LDAP challenge succeeded, but the user does not have an objectGUID attribute.
data.value: LDAP iziv je bil uspešen, vendar uporabnik nima atributa objectGUID.

data.name: LDAP challenge succeeded (un-provisioned account).
data.value: LDAP iziv je bil uspešen (nerealiziran račun).

data.name: LDAP challenge succeeded (fully provisioned account).
data.value: LDAP iziv je bil uspešen (popolnoma realiziran račun).

data.name: LDAP challenge succeeded (partially provisioned account).
data.value: LDAP iziv je bil uspešen (delno realiziran račun).

data.name: The specified role has been deleted.
Role name is already in use.
data.value: Ime vloge je že v uporabi.

data.name: Account name is already in use.
data.value: Ime računa je že v uporabi.

data.name: Email address is already in use.
data.value: Elektronski naslov je že v uporabi.

data.name: Could not save the attached image, type not allowed.
data.value: Slike, priložene, ni bilo mogoče shraniti, vrsta ni dovoljena.

data.name: The profile has been saved successfully!
Could not save the attached file, too large
data.value: Ni bilo mogoče shraniti pripete datoteke, prevelika je

data.name: The page is protected and cannot be deleted. A moderator or an administrator must remove the protection before deletion.
data.value: Stran je zaščitena in je ni mogoče izbrisati. Moderator ali administrator morata odstraniti zaščito preden bo mogoče izbrisati.

data.name: The page is protected and cannot be modified except by a moderator or an administrator unless the protection is removed.
data.value: Stran je zaščitena in je ni mogoče spreminjati razen če jo odobri moderator ali administrator, razen če se zaščita odstraniti.

data.name: A change summary is required for page edits.
data.value: Za urejanje strani je potrebno povzetek sprememb.

data.name: The characters '::' are used to denote a namespace name. A page name cannot contain more than one set of these characters.
data.value: Če se uporabi '::' predstavlja ime prostora. Ime strani ne sme vsebovati več kot enega niza teh znakov.

data.name: The page name you entered already exists.
data.value: Ime strani, ki ste ga vnesli, že obstaja.

data.name: The specified user was not found.
The latest compilation statistics for all wiki pages.
data.value: Najnovejša statistika kompilacij za vse strani na wikipediji.

data.name: Note that each save button saves all sections, multiple are provided for convenience.
data.value: Upoštevajte, da vsako gumb za shranjevanje shrani vse odseke, več jih je na voljo za udobje.
